text:
## Weekly Update - 2026-04-05

Hey <@&1424461167883194418>, 66 PRs merged this week. A lot of heavy lifting on the infrastructure side, plus a massive wave of new community apps.

🎵 **Audio & Video Engine Swap**
- The SDK got a major audio overhaul with dedicated TTS and music endpoints.
- Added `ACE-Step 1.5` for music generation.
- Upgraded OpenAI audio to `gpt-audio-mini` and added `openai-audio-large`.
- Audio caching is live, so repeat generations are instantly pulled from the media cache.
- Fixed `nova-reel` multi-shot video generation.

🖼️ **Models & SDK Tweaks**
- Added `Wan 2.7` image models (via DashScope).
- Migrated `Klein 4B` to RunPod for better stability.
- Updated LTX-2 to `LTX-2.3`.
- SDK default image model is now `zimage`.
- You can now edit images directly via the SDK (`POST /v1/images/edits`).

🔑 **API Keys & Core**
- Full API key management endpoints are live: you can now create, list, and revoke keys programmatically.
- Fixed stale API key data caching issues.

🤖 **Community & Bots**
- Over 20 new apps added to the showcase this week (RPG engines, 3D icon generators, YouTube-to-blog tools).
- Deployed a new Discord bot family, including `CatGPT` (text-first with vision) and an Opposite Prompt bot.

Cleaned up some dead apps, updated the docs, and kept the servers humming. Build something cool this weekend.
